Engineering Trust Since 2018

We Bridge Design &
Construction Reality.

TBES Global is a premier BIM consultancy transforming the AEC industry through data-rich digital twins and collaborative engineering.

Who We Are

An Innovative BIM
Solutions Provider.

Established in 2018 in Eastern India, TBES Global has rapidly evolved into a global service provider. We specialize in Building Information Modeling (BIM) for architects, contractors, and consultants worldwide.

"Our mission is to uplift engineering value through collaborative design support and high-fidelity BIM adoption."

Infrastructure Excellence

Proven track record in major metro & city projects.

Collaborative Design

Working as an extension of your engineering team.

Global Standards

Expertise in ISO 19650 and international building codes.

Proven Legacy

Delivering BIM excellence since 2018.

Our Legacy

Notable Global Achievements

Doha Metro

Major infrastructure project in the MENA region with large-scale BIM implementation.

Lusail City

Comprehensive infrastructure development project showcasing global capabilities.

Elizabeth Airport

Full BIM modeling and coordination services for airport infrastructure development.

Our Approach

Guided by Professional Religion & Excellence.

Client Commitment

Our prime motto that sets us apart from global competition.

Continuous Effort

Meeting rising market demands with consistent passion.

Core Religion

Dedication, consistency, and trust are our organizational pillars.

Trust Building

Developing continued services with our valuable long-term clients.

Engineering Value

Our mission to add tangible engineering value to every project.

Cost Efficiency

Optimized approaches to reach milestones within budget and time.

Ready to Advance Your Project?

Experience the difference of working with a premier BIM consultancy.
